test_traj.command:
cat > test_alive.ll << 'EOF'
; Test for alive-tv

define i1 @test(i32 %N, i1 %cond) {
entry:
  %pre = icmp ule i32 0, %N
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %pre)
  br label %loop.header

loop.header:
  %iv = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop.latch ]
  %exitcond = icmp eq i32 %iv, %N
  br i1 %exitcond, label %exit1, label %loop.latch

loop.latch:
  %iv.next = add i32 %iv, 1
  br i1 %cond, label %loop.header, label %exit2

exit1:
  %t1 = icmp ule i32 %iv, %N
  ret i1 %t1

exit2:
  %t2 = icmp ule i32 %iv, %N
  ret i1 %t2
}

declare void @llvm.assume(i1)
EOF
opt -S -passes="constraint-elimination" test_alive.ll -o test_alive_opt.ll && alive-tv test_alive.ll test_alive_opt.ll 2>&1

test_traj.command:
cat > test_alive2.ll << 'EOF'
; Test for alive-tv - potential issue with signed values

define i1 @test(i32 %N, i1 %cond) {
entry:
  ; No assumption about 0 <= N
  br label %loop.header

loop.header:
  %iv = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop.latch ]
  %exitcond = icmp eq i32 %iv, %N
  br i1 %exitcond, label %exit1, label %loop.latch

loop.latch:
  %iv.next = add i32 %iv, 1
  br i1 %cond, label %loop.header, label %exit2

exit1:
  %t1 = icmp ule i32 %iv, %N
  ret i1 %t1

exit2:
  %t2 = icmp ule i32 %iv, %N
  ret i1 %t2
}
EOF
opt -S -passes="constraint-elimination" test_alive2.ll -o test_alive2_opt.ll && alive-tv test_alive2.ll test_alive2_opt.ll 2>&1
